title: AI Curated Undervalued Folio
author: AffectionateFrame359
selftext:
**The Weekly Ten  6.5-week audit (start: 8 Aug → thru 22 Sep)**  
Ten equal-weighted tickers per week. Entries locked at card timestamps. Measured on **daily closes only**. Pics show weekly rebalanced folio; not all tickers were in the folio at once. Below is the **all-time cohort** view (first-mention only).

**Winners & laggards**  
Top 3 by %: **RGTI** (big pop), **RIOT**, **APLD**, **AG**.  
Bottom 3 by %: **VKTX** (rough), **ANF**, **ASO**.

**Bracket breakdown (22 uniques, first-mention only)**  
• **<0% (3):** ANF −14.88; ASO −10.87; VKTX −32.94  
• **0–5% (3):** FHI \~+2.35; GENI \~+3.71; TGNA \~+3.78  
• **5–10% (3):** LMND \~+7.3; MIRM \~+9.39; MMS \~+9.92  
• **10–20% (5):** CRC \~+12.77; FRO \~+14.76; MHO \~+11.11; MRCY \~+13.08; OSCR \~+12.5  
• **20–50% (7):** AG \~+47.12; UEC \~+28.75; SMR \~+27.0; APLD \~+72.23; STNE \~+26.4; RIOT \~+44.3; WULF \~+29.46  
• **50%+ (1):** RGTI \~+92

**Drawdowns** *(max close-to-close drop vs entry, through 19 Sep)*  
Worst 3: **VKTX (\~39%)**, **ANF (\~14.88%)**, **ASO (\~14%)**. Most others stayed tight; several **never closed below entry**. Daily closes only (no intraday).

**Cohort stats** *(first-mention week → 19 Sep close)*  
W1 (10): **8/10 winners**; mean \~+14%; median \~+10.52%  
W2 (6): **5/6 winners**; mean \~+14.48%; median \~+11.34%  
W3 (6): **6/6 winners**; mean \~+30.50%; median \~+20.58%  
*Duplicates only counted once at first mention.*

# What actually moved names (short, source-backed)

**AI / compute did the heavy lifting:** equal-weight helped.  
• **RGTI**: Won a **$5.8M, 3-yr** U.S. Air Force quantum-networking contract (with QphoX). ([investors.rigetti.com](https://investors.rigetti.com/news-releases/news-release-details/rigetti-collaboration-qphox-awarded-58m-afrl-contract-advance?utm_source=chatgpt.com))  
• **APLD**: CoreWeave added **150MW**, taking **contracted lease rev. to \~$11B**. ([Applied Digital Corporation](https://ir.applieddigital.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/128/applied-digital-finalizes-additional-150mw-lease-with?utm_source=chatgpt.com))  
• **RIOT**: Solid **August ops (477 BTC)** and a firm BTC tape (BTC \~$112–115k in mid-Sep; record \~$123k in July). ([riotplatforms.com](https://www.riotplatforms.com/riot-announces-august-2025-production-and-operations-updates/?utm_source=chatgpt.com))  
• **WULF**: **10-yr AI hosting** with Fluidstack; **$3.7B** contracted revs, **Google backstop/8% stake**. ([TeraWulf Inc.](https://investors.terawulf.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/112/terawulf-signs-200-mw-10-year-ai-hosting-agreements-with?utm_source=chatgpt.com))  
• **SMR**: Sector tailwinds from new **US–UK nuclear push**/SMR acceleration. ([The Guardian](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2025/sep/17/what-is-new-uk-us-tech-deal-ai-supercomputers-investment-economy?utm_source=chatgpt.com))

**Metals / energy:**  
• **AG**: Rode **silver’s 14-yr highs** \+ solid Q2 prints. ([MINING.COM](https://www.mining.com/silver-price-shoots-above-42-for-fresh-14-year-high/?utm_source=chatgpt.com))  
• **UEC**: Launched a **U.S. refining/conversion** subsidiary amid uranium uptrend. ([Uranium Energy Corporation Website](https://www.uraniumenergy.com/news/releases/index.php?content_id=1117&utm_source=chatgpt.com))

**What didn’t (biotech/retail):**  
• **VKTX**: Mid-stage **oral GLP-1/GIP** pill data triggered **tolerability/attrition** worries despite efficacy. ([Barron's](https://www.barrons.com/articles/viking-stock-weight-loss-obesity-pill-b98eaf4e?utm_source=chatgpt.com))  
• **ANF**: Slipped on **tepid 2025 sales/margin outlook** and tariff overhang; fresh **Sell** call hit sentiment. ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/retail-consumer/abercrombie-fitch-forecasts-annual-sales-growth-below-estimates-2025-03-05/?utm_source=chatgpt.com))  
• **ASO**: Traded lower on a **Q2 miss / cautious read-through** versus expectations. ([Investing.com UK](https://uk.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-academy-sports-misses-q2-2025-eps-forecasts-93CH-4248299?utm_source=chatgpt.com))

# Method & receipts

**How measured:** Equal-weight per ticker from **first appearance** (W1: 08 Aug; W2: 18 Aug; W3: 22 Aug) to **19 Sep 2025 close (UTC)**. **Daily closes only**; no intraday, no divs/fees/slippage. Notes above only when there’s **concrete, verifiable** catalysts (filings/earnings first, then major news).  
**Process (abridged):** Weekly workflow screens U.S. stocks (no funds/ETFs), cleans data, batches quotes, computes basic momentum/liquidity flags (vs 50/200-DMA, 52-wk proximity, RVOL), removes flaky names, then ranks candidates by a blended **valuation/quality/momentum/liquidity/risk** score with guardrails (sector balance, liquidity, spreads, binary events). Picks **ten**.

*Disclaimer:* Research/education only. **Not investment advice.** Just documenting the process output.

#
